whyChooseUs.title: Why Choose Us
whyChooseUs.subtitle: Everything parents look for — and children love — in one nurturing campus.
whyChooseUs.englishMediumDesc: Strong foundation in English communication and literacy from early years.
whyChooseUs.qualifiedTeachersDesc: Dedicated educators with proven teaching experience and subject expertise.
whyChooseUs.safeEnvironmentDesc: A caring campus where every child feels secure, valued, and supported.
whyChooseUs.busFacilityDesc: Safe and reliable transport covering nearby villages and town areas.
whyChooseUs.smartClassroomsDesc: Modern learning tools to make lessons engaging and interactive.
whyChooseUs.hygienicCampusDesc: Well-maintained classrooms, washrooms, and play areas for healthy learning.
whyChooseUs.coCurricularDesc: Sports, arts, and cultural programs for all-round development.
whyChooseUs.govtCurriculumDesc: Structured syllabus aligned with NCERT standards and government best practices.

about.title: About Our School
about.subtitle: Building bright futures in the heart of Soin Kalan, District Sheopur, Madhya Pradesh.
about.history: Shiv Jyoti Convent School is a government-certified, NCERT-affiliated English-medium institution serving families in Soin Kalan and surrounding areas of District Sheopur, Madhya Pradesh. From LKG to Class 8, we provide a safe, nurturing environment where children develop strong academic foundations, good values, and confidence for life.
about.history2: Our campus is designed to feel welcoming for young learners while maintaining the discipline and quality that parents expect. We combine traditional values with modern teaching methods to help every student reach their full potential.
about.mission: To provide affordable, quality English-medium education that nurtures curiosity, character, and competence in every child from LKG to Class 8.
about.vision: To be the most trusted school in Sheopur district — known for academic excellence, holistic development, and a warm community spirit.
about.values: Integrity, respect, discipline, creativity, and inclusivity guide everything we do — in classrooms, on the playground, and in our community.
about.leadershipLink: Meet our Director & Manager on the Faculty page →

faculty.title: Our Faculty
faculty.subtitle: Experienced educators and caring leaders dedicated to your child's success.

fees.title: Fee Structure
fees.subtitle: Transparent fees with facilities included — no hidden charges.
fees.intro: Our fee structure is designed to be affordable for families in Soin Kalan and nearby areas. Transport and other add-ons are clearly marked below.
fees.disclaimer: Fees are subject to revision. Contact school office for the latest fee structure.
fees.transportNote: Transport fees will be decided after discussion if the bus facility is chosen.
